nasb.text: Now in the twenty-seventh year, in the first month, on the first of the month, the word of the Lord came to me saying,

esv.text: In the twenty-seventh year, in the first month, on the first day of the month, the word of the Lord came to me:

cnv.text: 二十七年正月初一日，耶和華的話臨到我說：

ccb.text: 第二十七年一月一日，耶和华对我说：
